svg.text: LAUNCH, GROW, AND MONETIZE A PODCAST FROM ZERO
Pick a niche you can talk about for 200+ episodes
Define your unique angle (not just "another business podcast")
Choose episode length: 15-30 min (short) or 45-90 min (deep)
Podcast as lead gen for services
Post clips on TikTok, Reels, Shorts daily
SEO-optimized show notes and blog posts
Ask for ratings and reviews every episode
Consistency: same day, same time, every week
